text: Welcome to the Magic Kingdom, Silvana!
Find the pairs! Match the word and the picture.
I like apple! Give me the apple, please!
I like banana! Give me the banana, please!
I like orange! Give me the orange, please!
I like egg! Give me the egg, please!
I like bread! Give me the bread, please!
I like milk! Give me the milk, please!
I like water! Give me the water, please!
I like cake! Give me the cake, please!
I like ice cream! Give me the ice cream, please!
I like pizza! Give me the pizza, please!
I like chicken! Give me the chicken, please!
I like rice! Give me the rice, please!
I like carrot! Give me the carrot, please!
I like grapes! Give me the grapes, please!

Put the pen in the bag!
Put the pencil in the bag!
Put the bag in the bag!
Put the ruler in the bag!
Put the scissors in the bag!
Put the crayon in the bag!
Put the notebook in the bag!
Hello! I am the dragon. I am very hungry! What can I eat?
Thank you! Now let's fly. How is the weather today?
Who comes with us on the adventure?
We found the treasure! Which gem do you want?
Can I have some apple, please?
Can I have some banana, please?
Can I have some orange, please?
Can I have some grapes, please?
Can I have some carrot, please?

Every day I go to school.
Every day I go to bed.
I am the Witch of the Past. Yesterday I lost my magic! Where did you go yesterday?
And what did you do there?
